Hero.title: Nova Paw Festival
Hero.subtitle: International Pet Festival, First Time in Qatar
Hero.description: Judged by WKU World Kennel Union & WCF World Cat Federation international judges. The world comes to Qatar, and your pet takes center stage.

AboutGrid.title: Where Paws Meet Celebration
AboutGrid.story: The {bold_nova} is Qatar's first international pet festival, bringing together families and animal enthusiasts from around the world for an unforgettable two-day celebration at The Pearl Island. Featuring {bold_wku} and {bold_wcf} international judges, this landmark event sets a new global standard.

hero.title: About the Festival
hero.desc: Qatar's first international pet festival   two days of world-class competitions, entertainment, and family fun. Experience a complete pet ecosystem featuring {nova_vet}, {adoption_zones}, and a curated selection of {food_trucks} at The Pearl Island.

story.title: Groundbreaking Debut in Qatar
story.p1: The Nova Paw Festival is a groundbreaking international pet event making its debut in Qatar on {date} at the stunning The Pearl Island, Qatar.
story.p2: This festival brings together pet lovers, families, breeders, and animal enthusiasts from across the globe for an unforgettable celebration of our furry companions.
story.quote: What sets Nova Paw apart is its international judging panel    {wku} judge all dog competitions, while {wcf} evaluate the cat shows.
story.p3: The festival spans a 270-meter venue divided into three main zones: the Dog Space, the Cat Space, and the Carnival Zone    each offering unique experiences, competitions, and activities.
story.p4: From the 18m × 14m Dog Arena hosting WDF/WKU-sanctioned shows to the 10m geodesic Cat Dome with immersive 180° projection, every space is designed for maximum engagement and comfort.

zones.title:
Explore the
Festival Zones
zones.desc: Discover 9 specialized zones at The Pearl Island, each designed for maximum engagement, safety, and fun.

dog.title: Dog Arena
items: Safe and exciting experiences for dogs

adoption.title: Adoption Zone
items: Connecting visitors with animals in need

market.title: Pet Market
items: Pet accessories, lifestyle products, and treats

food.title: Food Trucks
items: Variety of food and beverage experiences
Relax, dine, and enjoy the festival vibes

photo.title: Photo Zone
items: Meet mascots and capture themed moments
Designed for social sharing and memories

events.title: Gates Open & Welcome
events.desc: Festival opens    collect your passport and giveaway bag at the entrance.

events.title: Opening Ceremony
events.desc: Grand opening on the Main Stage with mascot reveal and sponsor introductions.

events.title: Best Dog Show    Round 1
events.desc: WKU international judges evaluate Puppy and Youth classes in the Dog Arena.

events.title: Cat Drawing Battle    Session 1
events.desc: Live creative battle in the Cat Dome    artists compete in real-time.

events.title: Dog Fashion Show
events.desc: Owners and dogs strut the runway in matching themed outfits.

events.title: Lunch Break & Food Trucks
events.desc: Enjoy cuisine from 6 food trucks across both zones.

events.title: Grooming Competition
events.desc: Professional groomers showcase precision trimming and styling.

events.title: Best Cat Show    Round 1
events.desc: WCF international judges evaluate cats inside the Cat Dome.

events.title: Painting Competition
events.desc: Live painting session with artworks projected across the Cat Dome walls.

events.title: Carnival Games & Activities
events.desc: Fetch & Win, Spin-A-Treat, Paw Shot Challenge, and more.

events.title: Day 1 Awards Ceremony
events.desc: Champion cups, medals, and certificates presented on the Main Stage.

events.title: Gates Open
events.desc: Second day kicks off with new competitions and activities.

events.title: Best Dog Show    Round 2
events.desc: Adult class judging and Best in Show finale by WKU judges.

events.title: Cat Drawing Battle    Session 2
events.desc: Second round of the live creative drawing battle.

events.title: Best Cat Show    Round 2
events.desc: WCF judges select the Best Cat of Show.

events.title: Lunch Break & Food Trucks
events.desc: Enjoy cuisine from 6 food trucks across both zones.

events.title: Dog Fashion Show    Day 2
events.desc: New contestants take the runway with their dogs.

events.title: Grooming Competition    Day 2
events.desc: Second round of professional grooming artistry.

events.title: Painting Competition    Day 2
events.desc: New artists create live works in the Cat Dome.

events.title: Adoption & Vet Zone
events.desc: Final chance to visit QAWS, Paws Rescue, and NovaVet booths.

events.title: Grand Closing Ceremony
events.desc: Final awards, Best in Show, Best Cat of Show, and closing celebration.

no_session.title: No Session Found
no_session.desc: Please complete your ticket purchase to access your personalized festival dashboard.

list.title: Dog Fashion Show
list.desc: Showcase themed coordination with your dog.

list.title: Grooming World Cup
list.desc: Expert styling judged by international masters.

list.title: Drawing Battle
list.desc: Live creative clash for all levels.

health.title: Health Compliance
health.desc: Pet Passport and Vaccination Records are required for arena entry.

TicketsPage.hero_desc: Choose your tier and prepare for an unforgettable weekend at The Pearl Island. Limited early-bird slots available.

Venue.title: A World-Class Destination for Pets
Venue.desc: Set against the stunning waterfront of The Pearl Island, Qatar, the festival spans a 270-meter venue featuring the Dog Arena, the immersive Cat Dome, main stage, food trucks, adoption zones, and carnival areas   all designed for maximum fun and comfort for pets and families.

Explore the
Festival Magic
Gallery.desc: A glimpse into the incredible spaces and experiences awaiting you at Nova Paw Festival 2026.
Gallery.social_desc: Tag your photos with {hashtag} and follow us for updates!

Join the Nova Paw
Festival 2026
CTABanner.subtitle: Don’t miss out on this incredible opportunity to celebrate your pets, connect with fellow lovers, and experience the thrill of the festival!
